title: Char Grilled Indian Lamb Kebabs
description: A malty and shattering Indian dish featuring palm sugar and tamarind, char grilled to perfection, kosher friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together palm sugar, tamarind paste, garam masala, cumin powder, coriander powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the spice mixture.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they are charred and cooked through.
Serve the kebabs hot with a side of yogurt sauce.
To make the yogurt sauce, mix together yogurt and a pinch of salt.
Refrigerate the yogurt sauce until ready to serve.
